title: 3 Dividend Kings Among 22 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In First Half Of February
text: There is a slew of dividend increases coming in February, including from dividend kings Genuine Parts, 3M, and PepsiCo in the first half of the month. Other popular stocks that traditionally announce annual increases in early February are Sherwin-Williams and Cisco.

title: The Dividend Kings Ranked By Quality Score
text: Dividend Kings have an astounding track record of 50 or more years of higher dividend payouts. I rank the Dividend Kings using Quality Snapshots, a simple yet elegant system for assessing the quality of dividend growth stocks.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Can't Get Enough of Berkshire Hathaway? Add These 2 Similar Stocks to Your Portfolio
text: Berkshire Hathaway's investment strategy helped it become an extremely successful stock.

title: 4 Dividend Stocks You Can Trust In a Bear Market
text: Dividend stocks can offer excellent returns in bear markets.

title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of January 8
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: Cincinnati Financial Schedules Webcast to Discuss Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Results
text: CINCINNATI , Jan. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) invites you to listen to the live internet broadcast of its conference call to discuss fourth-quarter and full-year 2022 results on Tuesday, February 7, 2023, at 11 a.m. ET. The company plans to release its results on Monday, February 6, after the close of regular trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market.

title: BlackRock, Kimberly-Clark Among 13 Companies To Start 2023 With Annual Dividend Increases
text: There were several double-digit boosts in December, with Mastercard and Eli Lilly leading the way with 16% and 15% increases, respectively. Abbott Labs began its second half-century of dividend growth with an 8.5% increase.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio - Final 2022 Recap
text: 2022 was another fantastic year for dividend growth, with my income increasing by over 13%. I recount every sale made during the year and the replacement purchases.

title: 2023 Dividend Growth Portfolio Review And Look Ahead
text: Review of the current holdings and sectors in the portfolio, and how it has changed over the years. Income projections for 2023, and potential pitfalls.
